data: {"generalSituation":"Under the influence of a strong easterly airstream, there will be a few rain patches over the coast of Guangdong today. With the easterly airstream being replaced by a southerly airstream gradually, and under the influence of an anticyclone aloft, the weather will improve and it will be hot during the day over the coast of southern China in the latter part of this week. The southerly airstream is expected to bring hot weather to the region persistently early to midweek next week.","weatherForecast":[{"forecastDate":"20260408","week":"Wednesday","forecastWind":"East force 4 to 5, force 6 offshore and on high ground at first. Southeast force 4 to 5 later.","forecastWeather":"Cloudy with a few rain patches.
